title: Buyer Notification Email Service Contract
description: API contract for sending transactional e-invoice lifecycle notifications to external buyers (customers)

invoiceId.description: Sales invoice ID (Convex ID format: sales_invoices|...)

cancellationReason.description: Required if eventType=cancellation. Reason provided by issuer when cancelling the invoice.

sesMessageId.description: AWS SES Message ID for tracking delivery

loggedAt.description: Unix timestamp when log entry was created

details.description: Optional human-readable explanation for the skip

error.description: Error message describing what went wrong

validation.subject: E-Invoice {invoiceNumber} Validated by LHDN

cancellation.subject: E-Invoice {invoiceNumber} Cancelled

rejection.subject: E-Invoice {invoiceNumber} Rejection Confirmed

notes.authentication: Internal service key (X-Internal-Key header) required. Not user-facing.
notes.idempotency: Service checks buyerNotificationLog before sending. If eventType already marked 'sent', returns responseSkipped with reason='already_sent'.
notes.emailProvider: AWS SES via existing email service (`src/lib/services/email-service.ts`). Resend fallback if SES fails.
notes.language: English only (v1). Localization deferred to future iteration.
notes.pdpaCompliance: Transactional exemption applies. No unsubscribe link required. Business-level toggle provides issuer-side control.
notes.logging: Every send attempt (sent/skipped/failed) appended to sales_invoices.buyerNotificationLog[].

responseSkippedNoEmail.details: Customer snapshot does not contain an email address

responseSkippedAlreadySent.details: Notification for this event type has already been sent

responseSkippedDisabled.details: Business has disabled buyer notifications for validation events

responseErrorThrottled.error: SES rate limit exceeded. Please retry later.
